sql_array: CREATE TABLE acl_rules (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, rule_condition VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO acl_rules (rule_condition) VALUES ('ALLOW all from 192.168.1.1');
UPDATE acl_rules SET rule_condition = 'DENY all from 192.168.1.100' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM acl_rules WHERE rule_condition LIKE 'ALLOW%';
